blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,200 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 15.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
